# cubrid-go

> Pure Go database driver for CUBRID. Implements Go's `database/sql` interface and includes a GORM dialector. No CGO, no native libraries required.

cubrid-go speaks the CUBRID CAS (Client Application Server) wire protocol directly over TCP, ported from the pycubrid Python implementation. It provides both a low-level `database/sql` driver and a high-level GORM ORM dialector.

Key facts:
- DSN format: `cubrid://[user[:password]]@host[:port]/database[?autocommit=true&timeout=30s]`
- Import path: `github.com/cubrid-labs/cubrid-go` (driver), `github.com/cubrid-labs/cubrid-go/dialector` (GORM)
- Register: `import _ "github.com/cubrid-labs/cubrid-go"` then `sql.Open("cubrid", dsn)`
- GORM: `gorm.Open(cubrid.Open(dsn), &gorm.Config{})`
- Features: parameterized queries, transactions, server-side cursors, result streaming, last insert ID, connection pooling (via `database/sql`)
- GORM features: AutoMigrate, full CRUD, relationships, advanced queries
- Install: `go get github.com/cubrid-labs/cubrid-go`

## Docs

- [README](https://github.com/cubrid-labs/cubrid-go/blob/main/README.md): Full documentation with DSN format, usage examples, architecture, and feature table
- [Product Requirements](https://github.com/cubrid-labs/cubrid-go/blob/main/PRD.md): Product requirements document with Example-first Design Philosophy

## Examples

- [database/sql Usage](https://github.com/cubrid-labs/cubrid-go/blob/main/README.md#usage-with-databasesql): Basic SQL driver usage with parameterized queries
- [GORM Usage](https://github.com/cubrid-labs/cubrid-go/blob/main/README.md#usage-with-gorm): Full GORM ORM example with AutoMigrate, CRUD operations
- [CUBRID Cookbook — cubrid-go](https://github.com/cubrid-labs/cubrid-cookbook/tree/main/go/cubrid-go): Production-ready Go examples — connect, CRUD, transactions
- [CUBRID Cookbook — GORM](https://github.com/cubrid-labs/cubrid-cookbook/tree/main/go/gorm): GORM examples — connect, CRUD, relationships, advanced queries

## API Reference

- [Source — driver.go](https://github.com/cubrid-labs/cubrid-go/blob/main/driver.go): Driver registration and DSN parser
- [Source — conn.go](https://github.com/cubrid-labs/cubrid-go/blob/main/conn.go): TCP connection and broker handshake
- [Source — stmt.go](https://github.com/cubrid-labs/cubrid-go/blob/main/stmt.go): Statement — PrepareAndExecute
- [Source — rows.go](https://github.com/cubrid-labs/cubrid-go/blob/main/rows.go): Rows — lazy server-side cursor
- [Source — dialector/cubrid.go](https://github.com/cubrid-labs/cubrid-go/blob/main/dialector/cubrid.go): GORM Dialector and Migrator

## Ecosystem

- [pycubrid](https://github.com/cubrid-labs/pycubrid): Pure Python DB-API 2.0 driver (original implementation)
- [cubrid-cookbook](https://github.com/cubrid-labs/cubrid-cookbook): Production-ready examples across Python, Node.js, and Go
- [CUBRID](https://www.cubrid.org/): The CUBRID database
